changelog:
Require real tool calls for detected Claude Code workspace actions, reject code-only or unfinished thinking responses, cap required-action thinking, recover polluted conversation history, and expose requested-tool plus transport-cause diagnostics.
检测到 Claude Code 文件、代码或命令任务时强制真实工具调用，拒绝仅输出代码或未闭合 thinking 的伪成功响应，限制动作任务思考预算，自动清理被污染的会话历史，并补充请求工具与底层传输原因诊断。
